item.title: I'm Just a Bill: Federal Cash Bail Reform
item.description:
👀 Federal Cash Bail Reform

Federal cash bail reform 119th Congress: risk-assessment standards · pretrial-services funding · cooperative-class member bail-pool provisions. Composes with Save-the-World Paper 10 · #5 Family Table · #8 Defense Klaus. 🟡 Provisional. Help Each Other Help Ourselves.
